name: 0xcraft
description: Agent operations plugin for OpenCode — harness-agnostic core with thin adapter layer. Orchestrates agents, skills, hooks, and MCPs with token-optimized lazy loading.

scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target bun --format esm --external @opencode-ai/plugin --external @opencode-ai/sdk --external zod && bun build src/cli/index.ts --outdir dist/cli --target bun --format esm --external commander && tsc --emitDeclarationOnly
scripts.build:cli: bun build src/cli/index.ts --outdir dist/cli --target bun --format esm --external commander

author: diss0x
